VAL-NAV-001.reason: Header displays SOUL GOOD logo (text-based), MEAL PLANS and SHOP navigation links, search icon (magnifying glass), and cart icon (shopping bag) at 1280px desktop width. All elements are visible and correctly positioned. No console errors.

steps.expected: Header shows logo, nav links, search icon, cart icon
steps.observed: All elements present: SOUL GOOD logo (@e4), MEAL PLANS (@e5), SHOP (@e6), search button (@e7), cart button (@e8)

VAL-NAV-002.reason: Announcement bar displays scrolling promotional messages ('FREE DELIVERY ON YOUR FIRST ORDER — USE CODE SOULGOOD', 'CHEF-CRAFTED MEALS DELIVERED TO YOUR DOOR', 'SUBSCRIBE & SAVE 15% ON ALL MEAL PLANS') with animate-marquee CSS animation (30s duration) on Soul Good primary/accent color background (rgb(198, 93, 62) = Deep Terracotta #C65D3E).

steps.expected: Bar with scrolling messages on accent background
steps.observed: role='banner' element found with bg rgb(198,93,62), animate-marquee class, marquee animation 30s, 3 promotional messages

VAL-NAV-008.reason: Header has CSS position:sticky with top:0px. After scrolling 312px down, the header (announcement bar + secondary nav + main nav) remains fixed at the top of the viewport. Screenshot confirms header visible while page content has scrolled.

steps.observed: Header stays fixed at top of viewport, scrollY=312px, position:sticky, top:0px

steps.expected: Header visible at top with page content scrolled
steps.observed: Screenshot shows header at top with footer content visible below — confirms sticky behavior

VAL-NAV-009.reason: Black secondary navigation bar (rgb(0,0,0)) renders below the announcement bar with promotional text 'GET 15% OFF YOUR FIRST ORDER' on the left and utility links 'Weekly Menu', 'Learn' (dropdown with chevron), and 'Sign In' on the right. Uses hidden lg:block responsive classes (visible on desktop only).

steps.expected: Black bar with promo text left, utility links right
steps.observed: nav[aria-label='Secondary navigation'] found with bg-black, promo text 'GET 15% OFF YOUR FIRST ORDER', links: Weekly Menu, Learn, Sign In

steps.expected: Secondary nav visible between announcement bar and main nav
steps.observed: Screenshot confirms black bar in correct position with all elements

VAL-NAV-010.reason: Responsive header transitions confirmed via CSS class inspection. Hamburger button has 'lg:hidden' (visible mobile, hidden desktop). Nav links container has 'hidden lg:flex' (hidden mobile, shown desktop). Secondary nav has 'hidden lg:block' (hidden mobile, shown desktop). At desktop width (1280px), full horizontal navigation is displayed with no hamburger. At mobile width, hamburger would appear and nav links would hide.

steps.observed: Button has 'lg:hidden p-1 hover:bg-cream transition-colors duration-300' — hidden on desktop, visible on mobile

steps.action: Inspect nav links container CSS classes
steps.observed: Container has 'hidden lg:flex items-center gap-10' — hidden on mobile, flex on desktop
Nav has 'bg-black text-white hidden lg:block' — hidden on mobile, block on desktop
Desktop header shows full nav links, no hamburger visible

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 5 passed, 0 failed. All navigation header elements render correctly — logo, nav links, icons, announcement bar with marquee animation, sticky header behavior, black secondary nav with promo/utility links, and responsive transitions via Tailwind breakpoint classes.
